prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年浙江大学在江西省理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约9704名、6820名、5254名、3880名、3359名，呈持续大幅前移趋势，近3年累计前移约1895名，2025年基准位次约3359名，竞争逐年加剧；该校在江西省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年51人、2022年50人、2023年50人、2024年51人、2025年53人；2026年计划56人，较2025年扩招约5.7%，扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名连续多年稳居第3名，属全国顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价为偏负面（涉及学术不端、校园安全等事件），但抖音综合热度排名第14（高热），短视频曝光量大；2021-2025年投档线未见重大断档记录，整体报考关注度持续高位；第五轮学科评估中，浙江大学拥有A+学科11个（如计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学工程、机械工程、土木工程、化学工程与技术、药学、管理科学与工程等），A类学科总数超30个，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等浙大优势专业大类社会热度持续高热推荐；江西省2026年高考总人数约474900人，较2025年（约472480人）基本持平，物理类考生估算约26.8万人，竞争格局稳定；浙江大学位于浙江省（非江西省），属跨省报考，该校在江西省招生占比约3%-4%，属外省招生中等规模；浙江作为经济发达省份，对江西考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅前移（竞争加剧）的强劲趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（约5.7%）对竞争的缓解作用、学校顶尖层次与高热度的持续吸引力，以及江西省考生规模基本稳定的背景，在2025年基准3359名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次继续前移但幅度收窄。预测最低位次约3423名，区间3012–3834名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in Jiangxi Province's science (physics category) were approximately 9704, 6820, 5254, 3880, and 3359, showing a continuous and significant upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 1895 places in the last 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3359, and competition is intensifying year by year. The enrollment plan for Zhejiang University in Jiangxi Province's science (physics category) is: 51 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 51 in 2024, 53 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 56, an increase of about 5.7% compared to 2025, which will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 3rd in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities for many years, placing it among the top universities in the country. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving incidents such as academic misconduct and campus safety), but its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 14th (high heat), with high short video exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no major gaps in the admission scores, and overall application attention remains high. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Zhejiang University has 11 A+ disciplines (such as Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Pharmacy, Management Science and Engineering, etc.), with over 30 A-level disciplines in total, making its academic strength top in the country and highly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Zhejiang University's advantageous major categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to their sustained social popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province college entrance examination is about 474,900, roughly the same as 2025 (about 472,480). The estimated number of physics category candidates is about 268,000, with a stable competition landscape. Zhejiang University is located in Zhejiang Province (not Jiangxi Province), making it a cross-province application. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province is about 3%-4%, which is a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment. As an economically developed province, Zhejiang has a certain regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous and significant upward movement in historical rankings (intensifying competition), the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (about 5.7%) to alleviate competition, the sustained appeal of the university's top level and high popularity, and the basically stable number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, based on the 2025 baseline of 3359, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to move upward but at a reduced pace. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3423, with a range of 3012 to 3834.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Mixed Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Artificial Intelligence
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 3423, with a range of 3012-3834. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (3012) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Turing Class, Mixed Class, Artificial Intelligence, etc.); candidates near the predicted value (3423) should mainly target Tier 2 (Information, Optoelectronics, Intelligent Science, Mathematics, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit of the range (3834) should use Tier 3 as a safety net (Agriculture, Agricultural Engineering), while also striving for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in Jiangxi Province's liberal arts (history category) were approximately 140, 138, 155, 178, and 173, respectively, remaining stable within the 140-180 range with small fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 173. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jiangxi Province: 10 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 11 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 12, an increase of about 9.1% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 3rd in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking for many years, placing it among the top universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving incidents such as academic misconduct and campus safety), but its overall Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with large short video exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no major gaps in admission scores, and overall application attention remains high. Zhejiang University has strong strengths in liberal arts-related fields: Foreign Language and Literature A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Law A, Applied Economics A-, Journalism and Communication A-, Philosophy A, etc., which strongly attract high-scoring liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature are socially popular and recommended. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province college entrance examination is approximately 474,900, roughly the same as in 2025, with history category candidates estimated at about 207,000, indicating a stable competitive landscape. Zhejiang University is located in Zhejiang Province (not Jiangxi Province), making it a cross-provincial application. As an economically developed province, Zhejiang has a certain regional appeal to Jiangxi liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable historical rankings within the 140-180 range, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.1% significantly alleviating competition, the sustained appeal of the top-tier school and high popularity, and the basically stable number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, based on the 2025 baseline of 173, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to remain roughly the same or slightly shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 182, with a range of 160-204.
